calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Posting Motion Fees
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DARCHER LLC.
Plaintiff's oral request for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, is granted.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BEANSTOCK MEDIA, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $29,286.87
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,338.89
Attorney's Fees: $3,540.00
Costs: $550.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $42,715.76
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
